attacks.name: Surprise Attack
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.

abilities.name: Exoskeleton
abilities.effect: This Pokémon takes 20 less damage from attacks (after applying Weakness and Resistance).

attacks.name: Rumbling Bees
attacks.effect: This attack does 110 damage for each of your Beedrill and Beedrill ex in play.

attacks.name: Chomp Whole
attacks.effect: If your opponent's Active Pokémon has no Retreat Cost, this attack does 80 more damage.

attacks.name: Leafy Charge
attacks.effect: Search your deck for a Basic {G} Energy card and attach it to this Pokémon. Then, shuffle your deck.

abilities.name: Needly Armor
abilities.effect: If this Pokémon is in the Active Spot and is damaged by an attack from your opponent's Pokémon (even if this Pokémon is Knocked Out), place 3 damage counters on the Attacking Pokémon for each {G} Energy attached to this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Impound
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, the Defending Pokémon can't retreat.

attacks.name: Singe
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Burned.

attacks.name: Nine-Tailed Transfer
attacks.effect: Move all damage counters from 1 of your Benched Pokémon to your opponent's Active Pokémon.

attacks.name: Flames of Revival
attacks.effect: Put up to 3 Basic Pokémon from your discard pile onto your Bench.

attacks.name: Bright Wing
attacks.effect: Discard a {R} Energy from this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Call for Family
attacks.effect: Search your deck for up to 2 Basic Pokémon and put them onto your Bench. Then, shuffle your deck.

attacks.name: Flamethrower
attacks.effect: Discard an Energy from this Pokémon.

abilities.name: Flaring Magic
abilities.effect: Once during your turn, you may discard a Basic {R} Energy card from your hand in order to use this Ability. Draw cards until you have 7 cards in your hand.

attacks.name: Energized Storm
attacks.effect: This attack does 30 damage for each Energy attached to all Pokémon.

attacks.name: Ferocious Bellow
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, attacks used by the Defending Pokémon do 50 less damage (before applying Weakness and Resistance).

attacks.name: Fiery Big Bang
attacks.effect: This attack does 10 less damage for each damage counter on this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Jet of Ink
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, if the Defending Pokémon tries to use an attack, your opponent flips 2 coins. If either of them is tails, that attack doesn't happen.

attacks.name: Tantrum
attacks.effect: This Pokémon is now Confused.

attacks.name: Pleasing Present
attacks.effect: Each player may attach up to 3 Basic Energy cards from their hand to their Pokémon in any way they like. Your opponent does this first.

attacks.name: Shoot Through
attacks.effect: This attack also does 20 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Reflect Energy
attacks.effect: Move an Energy from this Pokémon to 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Collect
attacks.effect: Draw a card.

attacks.name: Summoning Jutsu
attacks.effect: Search your deck for up to 3 Pokémon, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

abilities.name: Mortal Shuriken
abilities.effect: Once during your turn, if this Pokémon is in the Active Spot, you may discard a Basic {W} Energy card from your hand in order to use this Ability. Place 6 damage counters on 1 of your opponent's Pokémon.

attacks.name: Ninja Spinner
attacks.effect: You may put a {W} Energy attached to this Pokémon into your hand and have this attack do 80 more damage.

attacks.name: Iceberg Breaker
attacks.effect: Discard the top 6 cards of your deck, and this attack does 60 damage for each Basic {W} Energy card you discarded in this way.

attacks.name: Critical Slash
attacks.effect: If your opponent's Pokémon is Knocked Out by damage from this attack, during your opponent's next turn, prevent all damage from and effects of attacks done to this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Boundless Power
attacks.effect: During your next turn, this Pokémon can't use attacks.

attacks.name: Thunder Wave
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

attacks.name: Disconnect
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, they can't play any Item cards from their hand.

abilities.name: Synchro Pulse
abilities.effect: If you have the same number of cards in your hand as your opponent, attacks used by this Pokémon do 80 more damage to your opponent's Active Pokémon (before applying Weakness and Resistance).

attacks.name: Flashing Bolt
attacks.effect: During your next turn, this Pokémon can't use Flashing Bolt.

attacks.name: Minor Errand-Running
attacks.effect: Search your deck for up to 2 Basic Energy cards, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

attacks.name: Sky Return
attacks.effect: Put this Pokémon and all attached cards into your hand.

attacks.name: Genome Charge
attacks.effect: Search your deck for up to 2 Basic {P} Energy cards and attach them to this Pokémon. Then, shuffle your deck.

attacks.name: Psychic
attacks.effect: This attack does 20 more damage for each Energy attached to your opponent's Active Pokémon.

attacks.name: Psyspear
attacks.effect: If this Pokémon has at least 2 extra Energy attached (in addition to this attack's cost), this attack also does 120 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Psy Protection
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, prevent all damage done to this Pokémon by attacks from Pokémon that have an Ability.

attacks.name: Psyspeed
attacks.effect: You may draw cards until you have 5 cards in your hand.

attacks.name: Gentle Light
attacks.effect: Heal 30 damage from each Pokémon (both yours and your opponent's).

attacks.name: Eternity Bloom
attacks.effect: Search your deck for up to 4 Basic {P} Energy cards and attach them to your Benched Pokémon in any way you like. Then, shuffle your deck.

attacks.name: Buddy Attack
attacks.effect: If you played Emma from your hand during this turn, this attack does 60 more damage.

attacks.name: Tricky Steps
attacks.effect: You may move an Energy from your opponent's Active Pokémon to 1 of their Benched Pokémon.

abilities.name: Spiteful Evolution
abilities.effect: Once during your turn, you may use this Ability. Choose a card in your hand that evolves from this Pokémon and put it onto this Pokémon to evolve it. If you do, place 2 damage counters on the Pokémon you evolved in this way. You can't use this Ability during your first turn.

attacks.name: Cursed Roots
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, Energy can't be attached from your opponent's hand to the Defending Pokémon.

attacks.name: Overwhelming Pain
attacks.effect: This attack does 10 more damage for each damage counter on all of your opponent's Pokémon.

attacks.name: Horrifying Rondo
attacks.effect: This attack does 50 more damage for each of your Benched Pokémon that has any damage counters on it.

attacks.name: Ghostly Touch
attacks.effect: Discard a random card from your opponent's hand.

attacks.name: Geo Storm
attacks.effect: This attack does 30 damage for each {P} Energy attached to all of your Pokémon.

attacks.name: Trials and Trip-ulations
attacks.effect: Search your deck for up to 2 Transformation Tome cards, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

attacks.name: Rock Hurl
attacks.effect: This attack's damage isn't affected by Resistance.

attacks.name: No Reprieve
attacks.effect: During your next turn, attacks used by this Pokémon do 120 more damage to your opponent's Active Pokémon (before applying Weakness and Resistance).

attacks.name: Smashing Headbutt
attacks.effect: Discard 2 Energy from this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Continuous Spin
attacks.effect: Flip a coin until you get tails. This attack does 30 damage for each heads.

attacks.name: Devolution Ray
attacks.effect: If your opponent's Active Pokémon is an evolved Pokémon, devolve it by putting the highest Stage Evolution card on it into your opponent's hand.

attacks.name: Gale Slash
attacks.effect: If this Pokémon has no damage counters on it, this attack does 150 more damage.

attacks.name: Supersonic
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Confused.

attacks.name: Covert Flight
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, prevent all damage done to this Pokémon by attacks from Basic Pokémon.

abilities.name: Nighttime Maneuvers
abilities.effect: Once during your turn, if this Pokémon is in the Active Spot, you may use this Ability. Search your deck for a card. Shuffle your deck, then put that card on top of it.

attacks.name: Poison Sound Wave
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Confused and Poisoned.

abilities.name: Poison Point
abilities.effect: If this Pokémon is in the Active Spot and is damaged by an attack from your opponent's Pokémon (even if this Pokémon is Knocked Out), the Attacking Pokémon is now Poisoned.

attacks.name: Venoshock
attacks.effect: If your opponent's Active Pokémon is Poisoned, this attack does 50 more damage.

attacks.name: Smash Turn
attacks.effect: Switch this Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Corner
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, the Defending Pokémon can't retreat.

attacks.name: Strong Bite
attacks.effect: If this Pokémon has a Pokémon Tool attached, this attack does 140 more damage.

attacks.name: Acid Spray
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, discard an Energy from your opponent's Active Pokémon.

abilities.name: Gloomy Garbage
abilities.effect: Attacks used by your opponent's Active Pokémon that has a Pokémon Tool attached do 20 less damage (before applying Weakness and Resistance).

attacks.name: Guard Press
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, this Pokémon takes 30 less damage from attacks (after applying Weakness and Resistance).

attacks.name: Bounce Back
attacks.effect: Switch out your opponent's Active Pokémon to the Bench. (Your opponent chooses the new Active Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Metallic Hammer
attacks.effect: You may discard 3 {M} Energy from this Pokémon and have this attack do 150 more damage.

abilities.name: Startling Drop
abilities.effect: During your opponent's turn, if this Pokémon is discarded from your deck by an effect of an attack or Ability from your opponent's Pokémon, or by an effect of your opponent's Item or Supporter cards, discard the top 8 cards of your opponent's deck.

attacks.name: Special Whip
attacks.effect: If this Pokémon has any Special Energy attached, this attack does 70 more damage.

abilities.name: Metal Road
abilities.effect: Once during your turn, when this Pokémon moves from your Bench to the Active Spot, you may use this Ability. Move any amount of {M} Energy from your other Pokémon to this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Power Tackle
attacks.effect: During your next turn, this Pokémon can't use attacks.

attacks.name: Corrosive Liquid
attacks.effect: Discard all Pokémon Tools and Special Energy from all of your opponent's Pokémon.

attacks.name: Pernicious Poison
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Poisoned. During Pokémon Checkup, place 16 damage counters on that Pokémon instead of 1.

attacks.name: Absorb
attacks.effect: Heal 30 damage from this Pokémon.

abilities.name: Slimy Sliding
abilities.effect: When your opponent's Active Pokémon retreats, your opponent flips a coin. If tails, Energy for its Retreat Cost is not discarded, and they don't switch Pokémon. The effect of Slimy Sliding doesn't stack.

attacks.name: Dragon Pulse
attacks.effect: Discard the top card of your deck.

attacks.name: Target Together
attacks.effect: Choose 1 of your opponent's Pokémon and flip a coin for each of your Pokémon in play that has "Tauros" in its name. This attack does 50 damage to the chosen Pokémon for each heads. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

abilities.name: Watchful Eye
abilities.effect: Damage counters on each Pokémon (both yours and your opponent's) can't be moved to other Pokémon.

attacks.name: Snap Inspection
attacks.effect: Flip 3 coins. If any of them are heads, your opponent reveals their hand. For each heads, choose a card you find there and shuffle it into your opponent's deck.

attacks.name: Take Down
attacks.effect: This Pokémon also does 10 damage to itself.

abilities.name: Smooth Coat
abilities.effect: If any damage is done to this Pokémon by attacks, flip a coin. If heads, prevent that damage.

attacks.name: Energized Slap
attacks.effect: This attack does 40 damage for each Energy attached to this Pokémon.

cards.name: Adversity Policy
cards.effect: If the Pokémon this card is attached to has Weakness to your opponent's Active Pokémon's type, is in the Active Spot, and is damaged by an attack from your opponent's Pokémon (even if this Pokémon is Knocked Out), draw 3 cards.

cards.name: Ange Floette
cards.effect:
You can put this card into play only if you discard a Prism Tower in play, and you can put this card into play during the same turn you play Prism Tower.
Each Mega Floette ex in play (both yours and your opponent's) gets +150 HP.

cards.name: AZ's Tranquility
cards.effect: Switch your Active Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon. If you moved a Pokémon ex to your Bench in this way, heal 80 damage from that Pokémon.

cards.name: Emma
cards.effect: Your opponent reveals their hand, and you draw a card for each Pokémon you find there.

cards.name: Great Haul Net
cards.effect:
Choose 1 or both:
• Shuffle up to 3 {W} Pokémon from your discard pile into your deck.
• Shuffle up to 3 Basic {W} Energy cards from your discard pile into your deck.

cards.name: Philippe
cards.effect: Attach up to 2 Basic {M} Energy cards from your discard pile to 1 of your {M} Pokémon.

cards.name: Prism Tower
cards.effect: Once during each player's turn, that player may discard 2 cards from their hand in order to draw a card.

cards.name: Roxie's Performance
cards.effect: During your opponent's next turn, their Poisoned Pokémon can't retreat. (This includes newly Poisoned Pokémon.)

cards.name: Special Red Card
cards.effect:
You can use this card only if your opponent has 3 or fewer Prize cards remaining.

Your opponent shuffles their hand and puts it on the bottom of their deck. If they put any cards on the bottom of their deck in this way, they draw 3 cards.

cards.name: Transformation Tome
cards.effect:
You must play 2 Transformation Tome cards at once. (This effect works one time for 2 cards.)

Choose a Basic Pokémon in your discard pile and switch it with 1 of your Basic Pokémon in play. Any attached cards, damage counters, Special Conditions, turns in play, and any other effects remain on the new Pokémon.

cards.name: Bubbly Water Energy
cards.effect:
As long as this card is attached to a Pokémon, it provides {W} Energy.

The {W} Pokémon this card is attached to recovers from all Special Conditions and can't be affected by any Special Conditions.

cards.name: Magnetic Metal Energy
cards.effect:
As long as this card is attached to a Pokémon, it provides {M} Energy.

The {M} Pokémon this card is attached to has no Retreat Cost.

cards.name: Nitro Fire Energy
cards.effect:
As long as this card is attached to a Pokémon, it provides {R} Energy.

If this card is discarded by an effect of an attack used by the {R} Pokémon this card is attached to, put this card into your hand after attack damage and effects.

cards.name: Jumbo Ice Cream
cards.effect: Heal 80 damage from your Active Pokémon that has 3 or more Energy attached.

cards.name: Surfing Beach
cards.effect: Once during each player's turn, that player may switch their Active {W} Pokémon with 1 of their Benched {W} Pokémon.

cards.name: Tool Scrapper
cards.effect: Choose up to 2 Pokémon Tools attached to Pokémon (yours or your opponent's) and discard them.
